query:
SELECT
            p.id as plugin_id,
            p.plugin_group_id,
            p.plugin_artifact_id,
            p.source,
            p.external_provider,
            p.external_id,
            pv.id as version_id,
            pv.version,
            pv.blob_id
        FROM plugins p
        JOIN plugin_versions pv ON pv.plugin_id = p.id
        JOIN group_plugins gp ON gp.plugin_id = p.id
        WHERE p.plugin_group_id = ?
          AND p.plugin_artifact_id = ?
          AND pv.version = ?
          AND gp.group_id = ?
